title: Pulmonary / other organ-specific late effects (Ewing-relevant exposures)
context: Extension entry for ewing-survivorship-late-effects covering pulmonary and other organ-specific late effects tied to Ewing-relevant exposures. HIGH risk-tier patient-facing, education-only with the 'Informational, not medical advice - consult your care team' label, fully sourced, fact-vs-expression copyright firewall (synthesize facts and cite; never reproduce protected guideline text/tables/figures) upheld; publish requires that no patient-facing page ships without BOTH a credentialed pediatric/AYA oncologist AND a patient-advocate version-scoped sign-off (neither alone suffices). Extends the core set after M2.
objective: Draft the pulmonary / other organ-specific late-effects entry keyed to Ewing-relevant exposures, fully sourced and dual-signed.
acceptanceCriteria: Plain-language, education-only entry keyed to the relevant exposures; every assertion sourced; no-advice label; correct red-flag/seek-care routing; grade 6-8; WCAG 2.2 AA
No diagnosis, prognosis, dosing, or individualized risk figure; health-system-neutral where guidance differs
Passes all automated gates and carries both oncologist + advocate version-scoped sign-offs
